value: Hi there, thanks for reaching out. I appreciate you checking on this—I want to make sure I'm giving you accurate information, but I don't have visibility into our current route schedules or any planned changes to the SFO-LAS nonstop service. Could you let me know which page on our website you saw this on? That way I can either clarify what you're looking at or escalate this to the right team to confirm the details for you.
